description: File storage service contract v1 — 14 operations for hierarchical, file-oriented cloud storage. Targets OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox, Box, iCloud Drive, SharePoint document libraries. Folder/file model with metadata, share links, and incremental change feeds. Distinct from object-storage-v1 (S3-style flat blobs).

operations.description: List files and folders at a path
operations.name: list

operations.description: Create or overwrite a file with new contents
operations.name: write

operations.description: Retrieve file or folder metadata (size, dates, MIME, parent path)
operations.name: get_metadata

operations.description: Move or rename a file or folder
operations.name: move

operations.description: Copy a file or folder to a new path
operations.name: copy

operations.description: Search files by name or content
operations.name: search

operations.description: Append content to an existing file (where supported)
operations.name: append

operations.description: Incremental change feed since a previous sync token
operations.name: changes_since

operations.description: Delete a folder and its contents (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: folder_delete

operations.description: Create a sharing link with scoped permissions
operations.name: share_link_create

operations.description: Revoke an existing sharing link (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: share_link_delete

title: file-storage-v1
